aiAssistant.title: Scanalyzer
aiAssistant.subtitle: Ask me anything about the warehouse

landing.readyDesc: Join Scanalyzer and start managing inventory with speed, clarity, and AI support
landing.bannerText: Intelligent warehouse management, built for speed
landing.heroTitle: Reimagine warehouse control with AI-powered scanning
landing.aboutPara1: We are a dedicated project team building an AI-powered warehouse system designed to make managing your inventory simple and intelligent. With Scanalyzer, you can create, view, and organize your warehouse efficiently
landing.aboutPara2: Our system also features an advanced photo scanner that allows you to quickly capture and catalog items, making tracking your stock faster than ever
landing.aboutPara3: Whether you are a small business or a large warehouse, our platform helps you streamline operations, improve accuracy, and save time while giving you full visibility over your inventory
landing.feature_smart_inventory_desc: AI-powered tracking and management for all your warehouse items
landing.feature_photo_scanner_desc: Quickly capture, catalog, and track items using our built-in photo scanner
landing.feature_analytics_desc: Visualize and analyze your warehouse data to make smarter decisions
landing.feature_fast_scanning_desc: Scan items in seconds with AI-powered photo recognition
landing.cta_desc: Sign up now and take control of your warehouse with our AI-powered system
landing.featuresSubtitle: Everything your warehouse needs in one place
landing.whySubtitle: A smarter workflow for every warehouse
landing.whyDesc: Built to help teams move faster, prevent stockouts, and keep every shelf optimized with fewer clicks. Bring your warehouse processes into one polished dashboard
landing.workflow_organize_value: Group items into shelves and warehouses
landing.workflow_analyze_value: Track stock levels and optimize operations
